hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qiE '\.(env|credentials|secret)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: blocked edit to secrets file"}}'; elif [ -n "$f" ] && ! echo "$f" | grep -qE '(src/|clients/|docs/|\.claude/|\.github/|tests/|benches/|Cargo\.|CLAUDE\.md|web/|deploy/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: file outside allowed paths"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(rm -rf /[^a-z]|DROP TABLE|git push --force.*(main|master))'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: destructive command blocked"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE '(api_key|password|secret|token)\s*=\s*[a-zA-Z0-9]{20}' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Harness: secrets in staged files"}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$' && { result=$(cargo check 2>&1 | tail -5); echo "$result" | grep -q error && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Compilation failed:\\n$result\"}}" || echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; } || echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && grep -qiE 'prepared for future integration|Status: planned' "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"HARNESS: File has unimplemented features. Wire them into production code, not just define them."}}' || echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; } 2>/dev/null || true

cd /home/user/MoA_new 2>/dev/null; m=''; for t in ImageGenTool ImageUpscaleTool FreepikImageToVideoTool VideoGenTool MusicGenTool ElevenLabsTtsTool CalendarListEventsTool CalendarCreateEventTool; do grep -q $t src/tools/mod.rs 2>/dev/null || m="$m $t"; done; grep -q AceContextResult src/agent/loop_.rs 2>/dev/null || m="$m ACE"; grep -q track_recall src/agent/loop_/context.rs 2>/dev/null || m="$m track_recall"; grep -q detect_conflict src/tools/memory_store.rs 2>/dev/null || m="$m detect_conflict"; [ -n "$m" ] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"ARCH MISALIGNED:$m\"}}" || echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'
